selection_rationale: Selected top 3 by composite score: manual_work_reduction + observability_gain + safety_gain. All 3 are GO, LOW risk, zero external API cost, and directly serve T1D-PRODUCTION-SURGE-001 directive.

selected.selection_reason: Highest manual_work_reduction (10). T1 cannot currently see what exists without manual traversal. This is the most immediately useful artifact for T1 productivity.
Highest observability_gain (10) + strong manual_work_reduction (9). Detects patterns that humans miss. Directly improves pilot health monitoring.
Strong safety_gain (8) + observability (10). Detects regressions before they become P0. Critical for pilot longevity.

rejected.rejection_reason: Lower composite (20). Overlaps partially with embryo_run_history_analyzer. Can be built in next surge.
Lower composite (20). Only 2 directives exist — limited current value. Better after directive queue grows.
